flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 24% at Blackburn College vs the 2018–2022 baseline (341 vs 450).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Blackburn College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.6k → $28.1k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Blackburn College rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($25.6k → $28.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Blackburn College fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (2.9% → 0.0%).
